description: POST /content/entities/active with empty pointers array must 400 (lamb2 treats [] as 'no filter provided', NOT as 'return empty result').

body_json.message: ids or pointers must be present, but not both. They must be arrays and contain at least one element. None of the elements can be empty.

captured_from: hand-authored from handler source (active_entities.rs) - empty array is treated as missing
